STEP_1_api_status_ribbon.evidence: src/components/intelligence/ApiStatusRibbon.tsx created. Reads api_registry (active APIs) + data_feeds (enabled feeds). Props: showDetailed (compact pill ribbon | expanded grid cards). Pearl Mineral V2 tokens only — no hardcoded hex. TanStack Query v5 useQuery for both data sources.

STEP_2_ribbon_on_public_intelligence.evidence:
src/pages/public/Intelligence.tsx: import ApiStatusRibbon added. Rendered as {isLive &&
} directly above IntelligenceFeedSection. Only visible when isLive=true (fake-live compliant).

STEP_2_ribbon_on_business_hub.evidence: src/pages/business/IntelligenceHub.tsx: import ApiStatusRibbon added. Rendered as <ApiStatusRibbon showDetailed={true} /> at top of OverviewTab above KPIStrip. Business portal users see detailed card grid. Not wrapped in isLive guard — portal users are authenticated and see DEMO badge via hub-level isLive check.

STEP_3_realtime_subscription.evidence: src/lib/intelligence/useIntelligence.ts: useEffect + useQueryClient added. Supabase Realtime channel 'intelligence-hub-signals' subscribes to market_signals INSERT. payload.new transformed via rowToSignal(), prepended to queryCache ['market_signals'] via setQueryData, capped at 50 items. Channel cleaned up on unmount.

STEP_4_slide_in_animation.evidence: src/index.css: @keyframes slideInFromTop (opacity 0→1, translateY -6px→0, 0.25s ease-out) + .signal-new-item class added (ADD ONLY — no existing content modified). IntelligenceFeedSection.tsx: featured card and grid cards wrapped in div with className={isNew ? 'signal-new-item' : undefined} where isNew = updated_at > Date.now() - 2min.

STEP_5_fake_live_compliance.evidence: animate-ping appears in ApiStatusRibbon.tsx at lines 149 + 201. Both are inside {showPing && (...)} blocks. showPing is set to true ONLY in getDotStyle() when status === 'pass' AND isRecentlyActive(lastActiveAt) === true (< 10 min). No animate-ping on any component where isLive=false. Zero new fake-live violations.

live-demo-detector.evidence: ApiStatusRibbon: queries backed by real api_registry + data_feeds tables. No hardcoded counts or fake freshness. Ribbon on public page gated behind isLive=true. animate-ping strictly conditional on pass+recent. signal-new-item strictly conditional on updated_at < 2 min.

dev-best-practice-checker.evidence: All data fetching via TanStack Query v5 useQuery. No raw useEffect+supabase.from() patterns. Realtime channel in useEffect with proper cleanup (removeChannel). useQueryClient for cache updates.

token-drift-scanner.evidence: ApiStatusRibbon.tsx: zero hardcoded hex colors. Uses bg-signal-up/bg-signal-warn/bg-signal-down/bg-graphite/bg-accent-soft/text-accent/text-graphite/text-graphite/60 etc. — all Pearl Mineral V2 Tailwind tokens. No pro-* / brand-* / intel-* / natura-* tokens. No font-serif.
